mapper.select: select h.id as hid, work_title, work_content, work_file_name, h.create_time as h_create_time, case when c.is_delete = 1 then c.id end as cid, case when c.is_delete = 1 then c.course_name end as c_course_name, case when cl.is_delete = 1 then cl.id end as clid, case when cl.is_delete = 1 then cl.class_name end as class_name from t_homework h left join t_course c on h.fk_course_id = c.id left join t_class cl on h.fk_class_id = cl.id
mapper.insert: insert into t_homework(fk_class_id, fk_course_id, fk_chapter_id, fk_section_id, work_title, work_content, work_file_name, create_time) values(#{clazz.id}, #{course.id}, #{chapter.id}, #{section.id}, #{workTitle}, #{workContent}, #{workFileName}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: select h.id hid, work_title, work_content, work_file_name, cl.id clid, class_name, c.id cid, c.course_name c_course_name, ch.id chid, chapter_name, s.id sid, section_name from t_homework h left join t_class cl on h.fk_class_id = cl.id left join t_course c on h.fk_course_id = c.id left join t_chapter ch on h.fk_chapter_id = ch.id left join t_section s on h.fk_section_id = s.id where h.id = #{id} and cl.is_delete = 1 and c.is_delete = 1 and ch.is_delete = 1 and s.is_delete = 1
mapper.update:
update t_homework
work_title = #{workTitle},
work_content = #{workContent},
work_file_name = #{workFileName},
fk_class_id = #{clazz.id},
fk_course_id = #{course.id},
fk_chapter_id = #{chapter.id},
fk_section_id = #{section.id},
create_time = #{createTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select h.id as hid, work_title, work_content, work_file_name, h.create_time as h_create_time, case when c.is_delete = 1 then c.id end as cid, case when c.is_delete = 1 then c.course_name end as c_course_name, case when cl.is_delete = 1 then cl.id end as clid, case when cl.is_delete = 1 then cl.class_name end as class_name from t_homework h left join t_course c on h.fk_course_id = c.id left join t_class cl on h.fk_class_id = cl.id where c.id = #{courseId}
mapper.delete:
delete from t_homework where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select work_file_name from t_homework where id in
#{id}
